Caption: Experimental setup for single cavitation bubble under different water temperatures. The water pump is used to inject water into the test platform. The bubble is generated by a high-voltage discharge method. The water temperature is controlled by the temperature controller. The bubble evolution is recorded by the high-speed camera (Phantom V1612, 40,000fps).
